ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
Language: c%23
OpenDeepWiki is the open-source version of the DeepWiki project, aiming to provide a powerful knowledge management and collaboration platform. The project is mainly developed using C# and TypeScript, supporting modular design, and is easy to expand and customize.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The most popular .NET UI client technology

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ClassIsland/ClassIsland
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ClassIsland/ClassIsland
Language: c%23
一款功能强、可定制、跨平台，适用于班级多媒体屏幕的课表信息显示工具，可以一目了然地显示各种信息。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sbox-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public
Language: c%23
s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Interkarma/daggerfall-unity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Interkarma/daggerfall-unity
Language: c%23
Open source recreation of Daggerfall in the Unity engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI-powered bridge connecting LLMs and advanced AI agents to the Unity Editor via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Chat with AI to generate code, debug errors, and automate game development tasks directly within your project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Justsenger/ExHyperV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Justsenger/ExHyperV
Language: c%23
The Excalibur of Hyper-V / Hyper-V 神器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Prowlarr/Prowlarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr
Language: c%23
Prowlarr is an indexer manager/proxy built on the popular *arr .net/reactjs base stack to integrate with your various PVR apps, supporting management of both Torrent Trackers and Usenet Indexers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RMC-14/RMC-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RMC-14/RMC-14
Language: c%23
RMC-14 is an asymmetric PvP game that runs on Robust Toolbox.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet
Language: c%23
Home of .NET's Virtual Monolithic Repository which includes all the code needed to build the .NET SDK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lostindark/DriverStoreExplorer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lostindark/DriverStoreExplorer
Language: c%23
Driver Store Explorer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/SoftMaskForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/SoftMaskForUGUI
Language: c%23
Enhance Unity UI (uGUI) with advanced soft-masking features to create more visually appealing effects!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nopSolutions/nopCommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nopSolutions/nopCommerce
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core eCommerce software. nopCommerce is a free and open-source shopping cart.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
Language: c%23
Windows/macOS/Linux GUI client for GIT users

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unchihugo/FluentFlyout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unchihugo/FluentFlyout
Language: c%23
The modern Flyout app for Windows 11, built with Fluent 2 Design principles. Media Flyouts, Taskbar Widgets and more.
